title: Hostos Delegation Participates in NYC-Dominican Republic Academic Exchange
description: From June 26 to July 6, a diverse delegation of teachers, school principals, college professors, and administrators from Hostos Community College (CUNY) and the New York City Department of Education participated in an intensive academic and cultural exchange program in the Dominican Republic, co-coordinated with the Universidad Autónoma de Santo Domingo (UASD).

title: Students Learn about Internships and Jobs at Women in STEM Networking Event
description: Event featured representatives from several Science, Technology, Engineering and Math focused companies and organizations

title: Baruch Business Students Excel in Real Estate Competitions
description: Baruch business students demonstrate excellence in competitive real estate challenges.

title: Leadership and Career Readiness Take Center Stage at Presidential Lecture Series
description: PwC Senior Partner Paul Griggs and Michelle J. Anderson discuss the evolving labor landscape and the skills needed to thrive.

title: Bridging the Gap: Macaulay Students Explore Product Development with Google
description: Macaulay students participated in a unique new program in partnership with Google that allows them to get hands-on experience with product development, testing, and sales in the marketplace.

title: In Citizenship & Immigration Practicum, Students Navigate Real Challenges with Real People
description: How one class turns theory into lived advocacy and prepares students for the realities of modern citizenship and immigration practice

title: Guttman Community College Partners with The Citizens Campaign to Provide Training in Leadership and No-Blame Problem Solving
description: Guttman Community College partners with The Citizens Campaign for leadership training.

title: Hunter College Seeds High-Impact Community Partnerships
description: Hunter geology and urban policy students will partner with community groups to monitor indoor air quality and promote urban greening.

title: Six Hunter Students Will Study Abroad as Gilman Scholars
description: Six Hunter students chosen in this round of U.S. Department of State’s Benjamin A. Gilman International Scholarship.

title: CCNY undergrads produce five-star performance at annual national STEM conference
description: Five City College of New York undergraduates from the Division of Science were winners at the Annual Biomedical Research Conference for Minoritized Scientists (ABRCMS) in San Antonio, Texas.

title: Two Queensborough Students Named 2025 Cooke Transfer Scholar Finalists
description: Two Queensborough students have been recognized as finalists for the prestigious Cooke Transfer Scholarship.

title: Hostos Student NaiAsia McGregor Selected for Prestigious Kaplan Leadership Program
description: Hostos Community College proudly announces that student NaiAsia McGregor has been selected as a 2025–26 Kaplan Leadership Scholar.

title: CCNY Spitzer student Dayanara Rodriguez received a 2025 AIA Bronx Student Empowerment Award
description: Dayanara Rodriguez, a M Arch ’26 student at The City College of New York, is a 2025 AIA Bronx Student Empowerment Award winner, receiving a $1,000 scholarship.

title: ‘Seen, valued and encouraged’ — How Medgar’s Summer Youth Employment Program prioritizes networking that impacts future outcomes
description: How Medgar Evers College's Summer Youth Employment Program prioritizes networking to impact future outcomes for students.
